context: Tests whether the agent uses server-side filter expressions with LIKE and && operators, cursor-based pagination via page.next, totalCount include, and proper sort syntax.

checklist.name: Server-side filter expression
checklist.description: searchUsersPage builds a filter string combining name LIKE "<prefix>*", custom.verified == true, and custom.reputation >= minReputation using && operators

checklist.name: Uses LIKE for prefix
checklist.description: Filter uses LIKE with a * wildcard (not a regex, not a == check, not client-side String.startsWith)

checklist.name: Sort by name ascending
checklist.description: searchUsersPage passes sort: { name: 'asc' } to getAllUUIDMetadata

checklist.name: customFields on read
checklist.description: include.customFields: true is passed so custom.verified / custom.reputation are visible in the response

checklist.name: Cursor pagination with page.next
checklist.description: searchUsersPage threads the cursor argument into the page: { next: cursor } parameter (only when cursor is truthy)

checklist.name: Returns nextCursor
checklist.description: searchUsersPage returns the result.next value as nextCursor so the caller can request the next page

checklist.name: Async generator iterateMatchingUsers
checklist.description: iterateMatchingUsers is implemented as an async function* that yields users page by page, using searchUsersPage internally

checklist.name: totalCount for countMatching
checklist.description: countMatching passes include.totalCount: true and returns result.totalCount (not by iterating all pages)
